notes: Issue #18, investigated by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). NO RECIPE AUTHORED — www.gg.gov.au is UNREACHABLE from this host. Evidence: DNS resolves fine (www.gg.gov.au -> 23.1.105.207, an Akamai edge), the TCP connection is accepted, but the server never sends a response — ReadTimeout for BOTH the honest bot UA and a browser UA, and still ReadTimeout at a 90s timeout. So it is a silent edge-level drop (geo-fence to AU IPs, or Akamai bot management), not a 403/challenge and not a UA problem — a user_agent override will NOT help. Worth one retry from a different network/IP (or an AU egress) before concluding: unlike a Cloudflare challenge this may simply be geographic, same taxonomy slot as pak_pmo. WAYBACK IS THE VIABLE ROUTE and the shape is unusually clean: CDX for gg.gov.au/* returns ~4897 statuscode:200 captures spanning 2019-2026 (2021:3637, 2022:338, 2023:223, 2024:185, 2025:245, 2026:79), and 4890 of them sit under the single path /about-governor-general/governor-generals-program — which IS the Governor-General's speeches/engagements section. Real speech URLs seen: /about-governor-general/governor-generals-program/address-reply, .../address-reply-senate, .../first-voice-power-speech, .../governor-general-address-camp..., .../australian-local-government-a... RECOMMEND a follow-up aus_gg_wayback.yml with link_pattern anchored on '/about-governor-general/governor-generals-program/[^/]+$'; archived-layout selectors still to be determined. SCOPE NOTE: the Governor-General is the ceremonial head of state; the PM (pm.gov.au) is the head of government and may be the higher-value Australian source. country=Australia; source_url=https://www.gg.gov.au/; source_name=gg.gov.au; source_type=official_gov; region=Oceania; iso3n=36; content_format=fulltext; leaders_covered=governor-general.
